# Reporting Damage

To report a damaged item, it must be done within seventy-two hours of delivery via the support portal. This report should include photographs of both the damaged product and its outer packaging. If reported within this time frame, the order may be eligible for a free replacement or a full refund without the need for return shipping.

[Source: damaged_items.md#reporting-damage]
